slither_raw_findings.description: VulnerableStakingVault.migrateFunds(address,address,uint256) (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#93-95) uses arbitrary from in transferFrom: stakingToken.transferFrom(from,to,amount) (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#94)
VulnerableStakingVault.withdraw(uint256) (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#80-85) ignores return value by stakingToken.transfer(msg.sender,amount) (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#84)

VulnerableStakingVault.deposit(uint256) (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#73-78) should emit an event for: 
	- totalStaked += amount (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#75)

VulnerableStakingVault.withdraw(uint256) (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#80-85) should emit an event for: 
	- totalStaked -= amount (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#82)

Version constraint ^0.8.19 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.19 (src/sourcecode/obj/test.sol#2)
